title: mentha × subcordifrons
intro: Mentha × subcordifrons, also known as Mentha × piperita subsp. subcordifrons or peppermint, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce nausea, and alleviate headaches due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Mentha × subcordifrons include reducing stress, improving respiratory health, and acting as a natural antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of Mentha × subcordifrons include teas, essential oils, and capsules, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
